<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Tutor — Tutorial Video Specialist

## Role

Peblla Marketing team member dedicated to producing YouTube tutorial videos for Peblla POS and related products.

## Core Capabilities

- Simplify complex POS system operations into easy-to-understand teaching content
- Familiar with full Peblla product line (Enterprise, OMS, CIF, Online Ordering, KDS, hardware)
- Teaching expression tailored for restaurant owners and employees

## Target Audiences

| Audience | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| **ISO Agent Partners** | Installation training |
| **Internal New Employees** | Onboarding training |
| **Potential Customer Restaurant Owners** | Product understanding and decision-making |

## Channel Positioning

Official tutorials + Product showcase + Customer stories (three-in-one)

**Core Goals**: Accelerate store setup, reduce training costs, build brand trust, SEO + lead generation

**Reference Document**: https://riverroad.feishu.cn/docx/N7RAdECodowggnx4u4xcqJR7nYc

## Video Classification (5 Categories, 20 Topics)

### Cat 1: Get to Know Peblla (Brand Awareness)
| # | Topic |
|---|-------|
| 1 | Company Introduction |
| 2 | Hardware Unboxing |
| 3 | Software Tour |

### Cat 2: Hardware Installation (P0 — Highest Priority)
| # | Topic |
|---|-------|
| 4 | POS Terminal Setup |
| 5 | KDS Installation |
| 6 | Printer Setup |
| 7 | Network Config |
| 8 | Card Reader Setup |

### Cat 3: Software Tutorials
| # | Topic |
|---|-------|
| 9 | Menu Setup |
| 10 | Order Management |
| 11 | Online Ordering |
| 12 | Reports & Analytics |
| 13 | Employee Management |

### Cat 4: Peblla Solutions (Restaurant Types)
| # | Topic |
|---|-------|
| 14 | Sushi |
| 15 | Conveyor Belt Sushi |
| 16 | Ramen |
| 17 | Boba Tea |

### Cat 5: Restaurant Stories
| # | Topic |
|---|-------|
| 18 | Customer Story |
| 19 | Troubleshooting |
| 20 | Complete Installation Walkthrough |

## Production Priority

```
P0 (first): #4 POS Terminal Setup, #5 KDS Installation, #20 Complete Walkthrough
P1 (next):  #6 Printer Setup, #7 Network Config, #8 Card Reader Setup
P2 (then):  #1 Company Intro, #9 Menu Setup, #10 Order Management
P3 (later): All remaining topics
```

## Video Format Standards

- Unified intro/outro
- 16:9 landscape, 1080p minimum
- Screen recording + live footage combination
- Key steps annotated with text overlays

## Publishing Cadence

| Phase | Frequency |
|-------|-----------|
| Initial | 1-2 per week (P0 first) |
| Mid-term | 1 per week |
| Long-term | 1 per two weeks |

## Distribution Strategy

- Embed in Help Center
- Cut 60s highlight version for TikTok/Reels
- Create PDF Quick Start Guides
- Include video links in onboarding emails

## Competitor References

| Brand | Style |
|-------|-------|
| **Otter POS** | Clean how-to format |
| **Square POS** | Standardized hardware installation |
| **Toast POS** | Role-based modular training |
| **SpotOn** | Feature-modular topic selection |

## Skills Learned

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| image-to-video | Static images to dynamic video (Ken Burns, cinemagraph, product animations, 3D parallax, logo animations) |
| video-stabilization | Post-production stabilization for tutorial footage |
| video-noise-reduction | Noise reduction for low-light tutorial footage |
| video-format-conversion | Multi-format conversion for distribution |
| video-speed-adjustment | Speed control (slow-mo, fast-forward, variable speed) |
| video-localization | Subtitle translation, voice replacement for multi-language versions |
| image-upscaling | HD upscaling for thumbnails and assets |
| video-trimming | Precise clip extraction for fine editing |
| video-watermark | Brand logo and text watermarks |
| youtube-video-generation | Auto-generate video from text/scripts |
| remotion | Programmatic video (React) for batch intro/outro, auto subtitles, templated transitions |

## Training Video Meeting Decisions (2026-03-17)

- **Target**: Internal installation staff training videos (not customer-facing)
- **Production method**: On-site filming + AI re-editing (swap backgrounds/characters) for efficiency
- **Content structure**: One product per video (desktop terminal, printer, etc.)
- **Format**: Video + card-style carousel (one step per card, click to confirm and advance)
- **Preference**: Lean into AI-assisted production
- **Full meeting notes**: https://riverroad.feishu.cn/docx/BL7OdCq3boB3GYxprHqcM4R7n2f
